title: Conger Eels Plus
description:
Replaces salmon with goofy eels, now remastered

[OPTIFINE] REQUIRED]
body:
This is not a serious resource pack. I think eels are goofy and this has been an inside joke with my IRLs as far back as 2021. It's not that deep.

Contains meme audio including the fuck word.

The entity model will not work without Optifine or an alternative like EMF, but everything else will.

![A group of Conger Eels swimming in an underwater cave with seagrass and kelp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aa9efa18a9e5a8cc5466a2b7d4d4bee1360e5d4.png)
